notes: Registration, verification, login and logout are implemented in app.modules.accounts routes and services.
Database access is isolated behind a session_scope helper using the shared SQLAlchemy engine.
Email verification uses a database-backed token model and Alembic migration 0003_email_tokens.
Passwords are stored with Werkzeug password hashes, never as plaintext.
Registration creates unverified users; login is blocked until the verification token is consumed.
Verification tokens are single-use and expiry-aware.
Successful tenant login clears prior session identity, removing stale admin or tenant keys.
known_follow_up: Global CSRF enforcement is scheduled for V2-02-008.
Password reset and session rotation hardening continue in V2-02-003.
